title: Creamy Indian Chickpea Curry
description: A rich and flavorful Indian-inspired curry made with chickpeas, a blend of spices, and a creamy sauce.

ingredients.name: creamy
ingredients.notes: such as heavy cream or coconut cream

instructions: Heat the buttery in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the curry and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, garam masala, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the chickpeas are coated in the spice blend.
Add the creamy and stir to combine. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10-15 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
